description: A couple wants to book two spots on a guided walking tour of historical Rome.

nodes.task_description: Check the schedule and availability for the 'Historical Rome' walking tour.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds availability on the desired date and time.

nodes.task_description: Inform the couple of the price per person and the total cost.

expected_outcome.value: Agent provides the correct total price for two people.

nodes.task_description: Book two spots on the tour and provide confirmation details, including the meeting point.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully completes the booking and provides all necessary information.
